# arenaml_pipeline_dag (Resource)

pipeline directed acyclic graph (DAG) structure



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `pipeline_id` (String) id of the pipeline

### Optional

- `input_edges` (Attributes Set) input edges in the pipeline DAG (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--input_edges))
- `output_edges` (Attributes Set) output edges in the pipeline DAG (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--output_edges))

<a id="nestedatt--input_edges"></a>
### Nested Schema for `input_edges`

Required:

- `node_id` (String) id of the input node itself

Optional:

- `from_bases` (Set of String) ids of in edges from basis nodes [the should not be of zero length]
- `from_inputs` (Set of String) id's of in edges from other inputs [the should not be of zero length]
- `to_inputs` (Set of String) id's of out edges to other inputs [the should not be of zero length]
- `to_steps` (Set of String) id's of out edges to step nodes [the should not be of zero length]


<a id="nestedatt--output_edges"></a>
### Nested Schema for `output_edges`

Required:

- `from_step` (String) id of step node producing the output
- `node_id` (String) id of the output node

Optional:

- `to_inputs` (Set of String) id's of input nodes the output is forwarded to [the should not be of zero length]
